title: Monster Boy and the Cursed Kingdom

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2500U with Radeon Vega Mobile Gfx
notes: You need to install d3dcompiler_47 with protontricks. The game crashed because of this. Works with this tweak with GoG version of game added as a no-steam game. Tested with Proton 4.2-9 and Wine-Staging 4.12.1
title: Monster Boy and the Cursed Kingdom

notes:
You just have to install d3dcompiler_47, I used Protontricks to do that. Once you install that library, the demo runs flawlessly, like on Windows.

I guess this should work for the full game as well.
title: Monster Boy and the Cursed Kingdom

notes: Install the game, run it once, kill the process, then run "protontricks 449610 d3dcompiler_47" to get it to work.
title: Monster Boy and the Cursed Kingdom

notes:
I did play the demo for a while and (as everybody before me said) it works perfectly fine after installing d3dcompiler_47 through protontricks.
But from me a bit more detail about that process:
A; You obviously have to have protontricks installed first, for how to install it go to the github of protontricks (https://github.com/Matoking/protontricks)
B; Run the game once and close it with Alt+F4 once you only see a black screen.
C full game; Run "protontricks 449610 d3dcompiler_47" in Terminal.
C demo; Run "protontricks 1070270 d3dcompiler_47" in Terminal.
This will take a short while and after that you can start the game and it should run perfectly fine.
title: Monster Boy and the Cursed Kingdom

notes:
Steps to get it working for me:
Downloaded d3dcompiler_47.dll  here --> "https://lutris.net/files/tools/dll/d3dcompiler_47.dll" and  copied it to gamefolder --> "/Steam/steamapps/common/Monster Boy and the Cursed Kingdom/x64"

Protontricks did not work for me.
Got following errormessage: ###You are using a 64-bit WINEPREFIX. Note that many verbs only install 32-bit versions of packages. If you encounter problems, please retest in a clean 32-bit WINEPREFIX before reporting a bug.###
And the needed .dll was not available. (Unknown arg d3dcompiler_47
)
title: Monster Boy and the Cursed Kingdom
